---
tags: ancestral-sequence-reconstruction/observations
summary: Ancestrally reconstructed enzymes show greater expression than extant enzymes
---
#### Summary
**Enzymes generated by [[Ancestral sequence reconstruction]] tend to have greater expression** [^johnson2024].

[^johnson2024]: Johnson et al. (2024) "Computational scoring and experimental evaluation of enzymes generated by neural networks." *Nature Biotechnology*. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-024-02214-2
